items.name_en: 🎐SOLFERINO BOX 🎐
items.name_cn:
🎐SOLFERINO BOX 🎐
「Newest Autumn/Winter Color」
2020 IT BAG_ Must-have hot model, conquered the entire fashion world before it even launched! Inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag uses original factory fine pin-stripe Box calfskin, excellent texture and flexibility! Inner design features three-layer accordion pockets, easily accommodating daily essentials. New "L" letter top and bottom half-open clasp, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim, it's so interesting!
Model: 634306.Zx Size: 19x13x5cm

items.name_en: VOLTAIRE Handbag and Crossbody
items.name_cn:
VOLTAIRE Handbag and Crossbody
This name is derived from the French writer and philosopher Voltaire of the 18th century, who advocated freedom and advocated for a loose style. The entire bag is made of top-tier glossy box calf leather, making it soft and shiny, while amplifying the texture of the leather surface. The crescent bag shape is a very chic contemporary design, possessing many elements of the Bourgeoisie style of a fashion house, fully displaying an elegant charm and perfectly embellishing a city style!
Model: 787671
Size: 24×15×5cm

items.name_en: YSL Straw Kate 99, the front flap features YSL lettering and tassel accessories, paired with a replaceable chain strap and an adjustable leather strap. The shoulder strap can also be removed to use as a clutch, making it suitable for evening parties! The double-strap design comes with a leather long strap and a chain, allowing for free swapping. Wearing the short chain makes it a trendy underarm bag!
items.name_cn:

Wearing the short chain makes it a trendy underarm bag!
Model: 604276
Size: 26*13.5*4.5cm

items.name_cn:

items.name_en: Large with box batch YSL|LOU LOU Suede Chain Shoulder Bag|||Loulou_Black Brown Suede
items.name_cn:
Large with box batch YSL|LOU LOU Suede Chain Shoulder Bag|||Loulou_Black Brown Suede
The bag perfect for winter is here, coming to you with warmth! The outer layer has a light suede texture that is super soft and comfortable, offering a premium feel right from the start!
With gold vintage hardware, the whole bag has more character! The interior features a compartment for convenient organization. Most importantly, it is very lightweight for personal use, making it absolutely qualified as a daily commuter bag!
Large size 31x21x10
Model 8887 Large

items.name_en: New small size with box YSL|||Saint Laurent suede mail bag, very unique, low-key and cool, really brings out the charm of a stylish, individual, and chic woman. It is the most popular Niki mail bag from YSL right now. Women who carry this bag are quite extraordinary, either celebrities, supermodels, or fashion trendsetters. In the past two years, the Niki mail bag has really gained a lot of fans with its distinctive style!

items.name_en: New YSL Birkin Tote with Care quilting|||Black and Caramel, I can do this winter again!
items.name_cn:
New YSL Birkin Tote with Care quilting|||Black and Caramel, I can do this winter again!
The most popular tote of the year is definitely this one.
The capacity is really friendly, and carrying a big bag in winter really gives off a great vibe!
Sisters, I want the Black and Caramel, both colors are too beautiful. The YSL tote has a striking large logo, very individual and really beautiful.

items.name_en: LE5 À 7 BABY Soft Suede
items.name_cn:
LE5 À 7 BABY Soft Suede
The BABY version of the fine suede deer leather handbag. Leather buckle closure. This handbag has a soft structure, paired with a matching suede lining, lightweight and graceful. It features an internal card holder and comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, suitable for both hand-carry and shoulder-wear~ For a light and small bag in summer, this is the top choice!
Size: 15×16x7CM
Style: 809461
